name: Baked Creamed Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2 Place the spinach in a bowl and cover with 1/2 cup boiling water. Cover and return to a boil.
3 Reduce heat and simmer for about 4 minutes or until the spinach is broken up.
4 Drain the spinach but do not press out all the liquid.
5 In a blender or food processor, combine the spinach, salt, onion, pepper, cream cheese, basil, parsley, and egg. Process until just blended.
6 Pour into a buttered 1-quart casserole dish.
7 Bake for 30 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8 Serve hot.
